sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: threshold T = (AAT/GAT) × (Biggest Loss / -f) or T = (AAT/GAT) × f$. Requires historical trade analysis and optimal f derivation. Apply only when current market price levels are representative of historical data used in f calculation.

source_rule_text: Calculate the threshold to geometric mean using the ratio of arithmetic average trade to geometric average trade, adjusted by optimal f, to determine position sizing.
